financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company did well financially because more people chose to fly with them.
Even with global issues affecting profits, they still have enough money and are planning for future growth.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well despite challenges like geopolitical tensions and flight disruptions.
Fuel costs have been lower, helping the company, but unpredictable prices could still be a problem.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay in taking care of social issues like community and employee relations.
There is room for improvement in how the company is managed and makes decisions.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke with confidence about their plans and ability to handle challenges.
They consistently showed a positive attitude, even when faced with tough questions from analysts.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company gave clear answers about their plans and assets, but not about market demand.
They were not very detailed when predicting future performance, which makes it hard to fully understand their outlook.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well and expects to improve even more in the future.
There are some challenges, but the company is handling them and planning carefully.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: IndiGo is doing well by making more money and keeping customers happy, even with tough challenges.
The airline is planning for future growth by buying new planes and expanding its international reach.
